ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( ISBLANK(Payment_Date__c), Payment_Date__c > TODAY(), Payment_Date__c < Booking__r.Booking_Date__c, AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Completed"), ISBLANK(Payment_Date__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Payment date is required, cannot be a future date, and cannot be before the booking date
